title: quercus fenzeliana
intro: Quercus fenzeliana, also known as Fenzel's oak, is a species of evergreen oak tree native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where the bark and leaves are used to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Quercus fenzeliana can be made into teas, capsules, or extracts, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
